title: stipa lessingiana subsp. cyllenaea
intro: Stipa lessingiana subsp. cyllenaea, also known as mountain fleece, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family and is native to the mountainous regions of Greece. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Stipa lessingiana subsp. cyllenaea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal benefits.
